song.title: I Will Call Upon The Lord
song.author: Psalm 18:3, 46
song.presentation: V1 V2 V2 V1 V3 V3
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C F C F I will call upon the Lord, .C F C F Who is worthy to be praised. .C F C F So shall I be saved from my enemies.
[V2] . C The Lord liveth. . F C And blessed be the rock, . F C And may the God of our salvation . G (C to end) Be exalted.
[V3] .C Hosanna. .F C Blessed be the rock, .F C G (C to end) Blessed be the rock of my salvation.
